articles.title: NSG commando in CM Chandrababu Naidu’s security faints, heatwave intensifies in Andhra and Telangana - News9live
articles.full_text:
NSG commando in CM Chandrababu Naidu’s security faints, heatwave intensifies in Andhra and Telangana
The incident of NSG commando fainting took place when Andhra CM was speaking near the Anna Canteen. A video of the incident has now gone viral on social media.
A National Security Guard (NSG) commando almost fell to the ground after he got fainted due to heatstroke caused by intense heatwave gripping Andhra Pradesh and Telangana. The NSG commando is deployed in the security CM Chandrababu Naidu. The incident happened when Andhra CM was speaking near the Anna Canteen. A video of the incident has now gone viral on social media.
The video shows the NSG commando fainting before he was grabbed by officials standing nearby him. Meanwhile, the heatwave intensified in Andhra and Telangana with the temperature hitting 44 degrees celcius.
Andhra Pradesh weather update
As per the Andhra Pradesh State Disaster Management Authority (APSDMA), light to very light rainfall along with intense heat is predicted in five districts including Srikakulam, Vizianagaram, Parvathipuram Manyam, Alluri Sitharama Raju and Polavaram from April 20 to 23.
While dry weather is expected in Visakhapatnam, Anakapalli, Kakinada, Konaseema, East Godavari, West Godavari for the next three days from April 20 to 23. APSDMA also stated that heatwave is prevail in 32 mandals in Andhra Pradesh.
Telangana Weather update
Telangana Development Planning Society showed that 10 districts recorded temperatures exceeding 44°C, while 13 districts experienced temperatures between 43°C and 44°C, as per Telangana Development Planning Society.
An alert for severe storm has also been issued in Telangana. Following days of extensive heatwave, a storm is expected in several districts of Telangana. The districts where the storm is likely to hit includes Jangaon, Nagarkurnool, Medchal, Bhadradri, Yadadri,Medak.
SEVERE STORMS ALERT – DAY 2 ⚠️⛈️ Today the THUNDERSTORM activity will further increase in Telangana ⚠️ After high heat, SEVERE STORMS expected in Rangareddy, Vikarabad, Sangareddy, Medak, Yadadri – Bhongir, Medchal, Jangaon, Sircilla, Kamareddy, Nagarkurnool, Gadwal,… — Telangana Weatherman (@balaji25_t) April 20, 2026
